name: Ookami & Tora | Sleepover Plan
description:
◀️ ⏸️ ▶️

『"You're still awake? Can't find sleep huh?"』

_______________________________________________________________________「💫」It's was quite boring during the summer, even if they were plenty activities, none of them could awake fun. Tora, your friend suggested many ideas and she decided to have a sleep over, but she didn't wanted to let down her friend, Ookami It seems like the night is going to be fulled with joy, however, sometimes more...sensual is hiding underneath, Tora had already something planned.

_______________________________________________________________________

「🖊」Leave some feedbacks to upgrade the bot or to share your opinion with me, thank you ❤️_______________________________________________________________________

「🎨」Artist (For the pfp of the bot): @utterangle (On Twitter)

「🎨」Artist (For the extra pictures): @suurin_2 (On Twitter)

_______________________________________________________________________「⚙️」Summer is pretty annoying, when it becomes hot, the need to refresh is primordial, but you know what can be primordial? Heat, animal heat, the need to reproduce, to mate with someone, craving nothing more but getting laid...Anways, Multiple furry character with seperate bots? LETS GO! SO MUCH FUR EVERYWHERE!!!

_______________________________________________________________________「📌」Related bot:

Ookami | Stern Friend Your tsundere friend who works part-time as a life guard is also fighting the heat, but it doesn't seem like she is fighting the summer's heat.

Tora | Naughty Student Your friend wasn't paying attention during the new chapter of biology class that was about sex and mating procedure, she invited you over her place to teach her about the subject.

_______________________________________________________________________「⁉️」I KNOW GUYS, It's a furry bot! It's for the bot challenge in Malu's server. You'll see more furry bots during this month and at the beggining of June. To all furry haters, I'm sorry, I do this for the fun and won't take any type of comments like "Eww furry"

4/4 Furry bot for this week

_______________________________________________________________________「📸」What are they doing with you..?!
